name: O-2 global --dry-run: /compliance-add --dry-run reports the plan without writing to the catalog
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://nist.gov/x --id us-x --jurisdiction "US Federal" --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ ! -d tree ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && echo dry_run 1>&2
